description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named build that runs on every push and pull request. The workflow should have four jobs: Linux, MacOS, Windows_MSVC, and Windows_MingW. Each job should use a different runner, check out the repository, and then check out another repository into a subdirectory. The jobs should then install dependencies, configure the build with CMake, build the project, and run the example_implot executable with different build types, compilers, and architectures.
